hero.title: Accessibility Statement how to work around and all
hero.subtitle: Committed to making ancient wisdom accessible to everyone Aman

commitment.title: Our Accessibility Commitment
commitment.subtitle: Ensuring equal access to ancient wisdom for all learners
commitment.content: At Shikshanam, we believe that the profound wisdom of our ancestors should be accessible to everyone, regardless of their abilities or circumstances. We are committed to providing an inclusive learning environment that welcomes and supports all students.

principles.title: Inclusive Design
principles.description: Our platform and content are designed with accessibility in mind from the ground up

principles.title: Comprehensive Support
principles.description: We provide various support services to help students with different needs succeed

principles.title: Continuous Improvement
principles.description: We regularly review and improve our accessibility features based on user feedback

principles.title: Staff Training
principles.description: Our team is trained to provide inclusive support and accommodations

features.title: Accessibility Features
features.subtitle: Tools and features that make learning accessible

features.title: Screen Reader Compatibility
features.description: Our platform is fully compatible with screen readers and assistive technologies

features.title: Keyboard Navigation
features.description: Complete platform functionality accessible via keyboard navigation

features.title: Video Captions
features.description: All video content includes accurate captions and transcripts

features.title: Adjustable Text Size
features.description: Users can adjust text size and contrast for better readability

features.title: Audio Descriptions
features.description: Visual content includes audio descriptions for visually impaired users

features.title: Mobile Accessibility
features.description: Full accessibility features available on mobile devices

accommodations.title: Accommodations & Support
accommodations.subtitle: We provide various accommodations to support your learning journey

accommodations.title: Extended Time
accommodations.description: Additional time for assignments and assessments when needed

accommodations.title: Alternative Formats
accommodations.description: Content available in multiple formats (audio, large print, etc.)

accommodations.title: Assistive Technology Support
accommodations.description: Compatibility with various assistive technologies and devices

accommodations.title: Personal Support
accommodations.description: Dedicated support staff to help with accessibility needs

contact.title: Request Accommodations
contact.subtitle: We're here to help make your learning experience accessible
contact.message: If you need specific accommodations or have questions about accessibility, please don't hesitate to contact us. We're committed to working with you to ensure you have the best possible learning experience.

standards.title: WCAG 2.1 AA Compliance
standards.description: Our platform meets Web Content Accessibility Guidelines 2.1 AA standards

standards.title: Section 508 Compliance
standards.description: We comply with Section 508 of the Rehabilitation Act

standards.title: ADA Compliance
standards.description: Our services comply with the Americans with Disabilities Act
